queries:
نعم، كرم الإسلام المرأة ورفع من شأنها، وأعطاها حقوقها كاملة، وجعل لها مكانة سامية في المجتمع. وقد جاء في القرآن الكريم: "وَلَهُنَّ مِثْلُ الَّذِي عَلَيْهِنَّ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ" [البقرة: 228]، وفي الحديث الشريف: "استوصوا بالنساء خيرا".
كما أن الإسلام أعطى المرأة حق التعليم والعمل، حيث قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "طلب العلم فريضة على كل مسلم". كما أن الإسلام أعطى المرأة حق الميراث، حيث قال تعالى: "يُوصِيكُمُ اللَّهُ فِي أَوْلَادِكُمْ لِلذَّكَرِ مِثْلُ حَظِّ الْأُنْثَيَيْنِ" [النساء: 11].
بالإضافة إلى ذلك، الإسلام أعطى المرأة حق التملك والتصرف في مالها، حيث قال تعالى: "وَلِكُلٍّ جَعَلْنَا مَوَالِيَ مِمَّا تَرَكَ الْوَالِدَانِ وَالأَقْرَبُونَ" [النساء: 33].
وفي النهاية، الإسلام كرم المرأة ورفع من شأنها، وأعطاها حقوقها كاملة، وجعل لها مكانة سامية في المجتمع.
وَلَهُنَّ مِثْلُ الَّذِي عَلَيْهِنَّ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ البقرة 228
يُوصِيكُمُ اللَّهُ فِي أَوْلَادِكُمْ لِلذَّكَرِ مِثْلُ حَظِّ الْأُنْثَيَيْنِ النساء 11

output.code:
# Let's try to open the file path provided by system. 
paths = ["/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt", "/mnt/data/file-MpE892j9Q6DWAY9bBdeZfj-Q009.txt"]
content = None
opened_path = None
for p in paths:
    try:
        with open(p, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
            opened_path = p
            break
    except Exception as e:
        last_err = e
opened_path, (content[:200] if content else None)

text = content
len(text), text.count('"'), [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch=='"'][:20]

quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch=='"']
pairs = list(zip(quote_positions[::2], quote_positions[1::2]))
pairs

spans = []
for start_quote, end_quote in pairs:
    span_start = start_quote + 1
    span_end = end_quote  # exclusive
    span_text = text[span_start:span_end]
    spans.append((span_start, span_end, span_text))
spans

# Validate quoting boundaries for each span:
checks = []
for (start, end, span_text) in spans:
    before = text[start-1] if start-1>=0 else None
    after = text[end] if end < len(text) else None
    checks.append((before, after, span_text[:10], span_text[-5:]))
checks

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":121,"span_end":172,"span_text":"وَلَهُنَّ مِثْلُ الَّذِي عَلَيْهِنَّ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"البقرة","sura_number":2,"aya_number":228},"hadeeth_reference":{        "collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"وَلَهُنَّ مِثْلُ الَّذِي عَلَيْهِنَّ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":209,"span_end":229,"span_text":"استوصوا بالنساء خيرا","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih al-Bukhari","book_number":67,"hadith_number":120},"corrected_text":"استوصوا بالنساء خيرا","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":317,"span_end":344,"span_text":"طلب العلم فريضة على كل مسلم","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sunan Ibn Majah","book_number":1,"hadith_number":224},"corrected_text":"طلب العلم فريضة على كل مسلم","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":402,"span_end":478,"span_text":"يُوصِيكُمُ اللَّهُ فِي أَوْلَادِكُمْ لِلذَّكَرِ مِثْلُ حَظِّ الْأُنْثَيَيْنِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":11},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"يُوصِيكُمُ اللَّهُ فِي أَوْلَادِكُمْ لِلذَّكَرِ مِثْلُ حَظِّ الْأُنْثَيَيْنِ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":576,"span_end":649,"span_text":"وَلِكُلٍّ جَعَلْنَا مَوَالِيَ مِمَّا تَرَكَ الْوَالِدَانِ وَالأَقْرَبُونَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":33},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"وَلِكُلٍّ جَعَلْنَا مَوَالِيَ مِمَّا تَرَكَ الْوَالِدَانِ وَالأَقْرَبُونَ","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
